# Chapter 8: Testing and validation  (~110 pp)
- 8.1 Test-design as engineering discipline (15) · 8.2 Functional, performance, environmental, life testing (15) · 8.3 Statistical design of experiments (15) · 8.4 Accelerated testing (12) · 8.5 Software testing revisited from Volume VII (12) · 8.6 Field testing and beta programmes (12) · 8.7 Test-data management and reproducibility (12) · 8.8 Failure section: test plans that proved only what they were designed to prove (17)

**Archetype**: uncertainty, ethics. **Project**: design a test plan for one product the reader uses; identify what the manufacturer's test missed. **Exercises**: 25.
